name: LeanIX API
what_it_does: Enterprise architecture management platform with REST and GraphQL APIs for managing IT landscapes, application portfolios, technology radars, and service dependencies (now part of SAP).
use_cases: Querying application portfolio data for technology audit and rationalization agents
Updating factsheet (service/application) metadata programmatically from CI/CD pipelines
Generating technology radar reports and risk assessments from landscape data
Syncing infrastructure inventory from cloud providers into LeanIX factsheets
Automating CMDB-like service catalog updates when new services are deployed
not_for: Small organizations without enterprise architecture governance needs
Developer-centric service catalogs (use Backstage or Port instead)
best_when: An agent manages or audits enterprise IT portfolio data at large organizations using LeanIX for architecture governance.
avoid_when: You're a startup or SMB without dedicated enterprise architecture practices.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow. API tokens issued per workspace. GraphQL API available in addition to REST. SAP integration uses SAP Identity services post-acquisition.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; trial by request
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing typically $50k-200k+/year depending on feature set and users
pricing.notes: LeanIX acquired by SAP in 2023. Pricing is enterprise-tier and negotiated. Included in some SAP bundles for existing SAP customers.

performance.rate_limits: Standard enterprise API rate limits; documented in developer portal

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST and GraphQL API documentation is comprehensive. GraphQL provides flexible query capability well-suited for agent data retrieval. Error responses are JSON with descriptive messages.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GraphQL mutations and REST PATCH operations support deterministic updates. Upsert patterns available for factsheet creation.
known_agent_gotchas: Data model is complex — factsheet types, relations, and subscriptions require domain knowledge
SAP acquisition has introduced authentication changes; verify current OAuth2 flow
GraphQL schema is large — explore schema documentation before building queries
Rate limits per workspace tier may restrict bulk synchronization operations

security_score_components.security_notes: ISO27001 and SOC2 certified. Regional data residency options. SAP's enterprise security practices apply post-acquisition. OAuth2 with workspace isolation.
